blocks.subhead: A full rebrand for an independent games studio, formerly known as Twin Petes. New name, new identity, new site, and a voice confident enough to open with "do not scroll."
headline: Hello,
HEY
BIRD!

blocks.label: The brief
heading: A new name,
a new start.
paragraphs: The studio was rebranding entirely, new name, new identity, from a founding idea rather than a refresh. The brief covered the mark, the tone of voice and the copy alongside it, so the studio would sound like itself from the first line a visitor read.

blocks.text: Ideas were tested. A smoking fish? Matchbook screenprint? Speech bubbles? Refined over weeks, slowly honing down to the right species of fish, the right expression, the right amount of weird.

blocks.label: The voice
heading: Studio humour,
kept honest.
paragraphs: The website carries the same voice as the brandmark. "Do not scroll
" a label reading "for internal use only
" a welcome that just says "Welcome to the studio
pal." It reads like it was written by the studio
because the tone of voice was built alongside the visual identity

blocks.label: The result
heading: A studio brand
that stuck.
paragraphs: Hey Bird! launched with a complete identity, tone of voice guidelines and a website built to hold it, and it has stayed in active use since. A second engagement in early 2026 extended the visual system further, proof the studio kept reaching for it.

blocks.quote: Michael was a pleasure to work with. He was consistently responsive, kept us in the loop at all times and delivered high quality work incredibly fast. You can immediately tell he is an experienced professional who knows his craft and how to collaborate effectively. I would not hesitate for a second to work with Michael again. Highly recommended, top work.
blocks.name: Petr Skornok

items.value: Brand identity, tone of voice, web design
